data.description:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

COSCO Shipping International Singapore Co Ltd ( (SG:F83) ) just unveiled an announcement.

COSCO Shipping International Singapore Co Ltd announced the results of its renounceable non-underwritten rights issue, which offered up to 2,239,244,954 new ordinary shares at S$0.122 each. The rights issue was fully subscribed, with valid acceptances accounting for 63.76% and excess applications making up 36.24%, indicating strong investor interest and support for the company’s capital raising efforts.

More about COSCO Shipping International Singapore Co Ltd

COSCO Shipping International Singapore Co Ltd operates in the shipping industry, focusing on providing a range of shipping services and solutions. The company is part of a larger group that includes various subsidiaries, enhancing its market presence and operational capabilities.

data.title: Hisense Announces Final Dividend Payment Details for 2024
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Hisense Home Appliances Group Co ( (HK:0921) ) has provided an update.

Hisense Home Appliances Group Co., Ltd. announced the exchange rate for the payment of its final dividend for the year ended December 31, 2024. The dividend will be distributed as RMB12.30 per 10 shares, with A Shares paid in Renminbi and H Shares in Hong Kong dollars. The conversion rate for H Shares is based on the market exchange rate, resulting in a dividend of HK$13.46764 per 10 H Shares. This announcement highlights the company’s commitment to providing returns to its shareholders and reflects its financial strategy in managing currency exchange for dividend payments.

More about Hisense Home Appliances Group Co

Hisense Home Appliances Group Co., Ltd. is a joint stock limited company incorporated in the People’s Republic of China. The company operates in the home appliances industry, focusing on the production and distribution of a wide range of household appliances.

Average Trading Volume: 2,213,662

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$38.78B

Zenith Energy ( (GB:ZEN) ) has issued an update.

Zenith Energy Ltd. announced the full payment of coupon obligations for its 2026 multi-currency Euro Medium Term Notes listed on the Vienna Stock Exchange. This move underscores Zenith’s financial stability and commitment to fulfilling its debt obligations, potentially enhancing its credibility and attractiveness to investors.

Sky Metals Limited ( (AU:SKY) ) just unveiled an update.

Sky Metals Limited announced a change in the director’s interest, specifically involving Richard Hill, who has increased his indirect interest in the company. The change was executed through the conversion of performance rights into ordinary shares, reflecting a strategic move to align management interests with company growth. This adjustment in securities holdings may impact the company’s operational dynamics and signal confidence in its future prospects.
